categories.Western Philosophy: Ancient Greek and European philosophical tradition. Aristotle's Nicomachean Ethics, eudaimonia, telos, arete, phronesis, virtue, the examined life. Plato's Republic and the Good. Socrates. The Stoics Marcus Aurelius Epictetus Seneca on ataraxia and apatheia. Epicurus on pleasure and tranquility. Kant's moral philosophy, categorical imperative. Mill and utilitarian calculus of happiness. Nietzsche amor fati. MacIntyre After Virtue. Nussbaum on capabilities as philosophical framework. Analytic philosophy, moral realism, metaethics, normative theory, practical reasoning, the good life as a philosophical problem.
categories.Existentialism & Phenomenology: Existentialist philosophy and phenomenological tradition. Kierkegaard anxiety and the leap of faith. Heidegger Being and Time, Dasein, being-toward-death, authenticity. Sartre radical freedom, existence precedes essence, bad faith. Camus the absurd, Myth of Sisyphus. Merleau-Ponty embodiment and perception. Husserl intentionality, lifeworld, bracketing. Viktor Frankl logotherapy, will to meaning, Man's Search for Meaning, suffering and purpose. Marcel mystery and being. Buber I-Thou relation. Jaspers existential communication. Phenomenology of subjectivity, lived experience, hermeneutic circle, existential crisis, confrontation with meaninglessness, nihilism as philosophical position.
categories.Psychology: Empirical psychological research using surveys, scales, experiments, and clinical data. Positive psychology Martin Seligman PERMA model character strengths. Csikszentmihalyi flow states optimal experience. Carol Ryff psychological well-being six dimensions. Ed Diener subjective well-being life satisfaction scales. Deci and Ryan self-determination theory intrinsic motivation autonomy competence relatedness. Barbara Fredrickson broaden and build theory. Resilience measures, self-compassion Kristin Neff, gratitude interventions, post-traumatic growth Tedeschi Calhoun. Terror management theory Greenberg Solomon Pyszczynski. Randomized controlled trials, longitudinal studies, participants, regression analysis, psychometric validation, clinical interventions, well-being questionnaires.
categories.Islamic Thought: Islamic philosophy theology ethics law spirituality. Al-Ghazali Kimiya al-Saada Ihya Ulum al-Din revival of religious sciences. Ibn Sina the soul and intellect. Ibn Rushd Averroes commentary on Aristotle. Al-Farabi virtuous city. Kalam theology divine attributes free will. Maqasid al-shariah objectives of Islamic law preservation of life intellect progeny wealth religion. Fiqh jurisprudence halal haram. Sufism tasawwuf tariqa dhikr. Fana annihilation in God. Marifa gnosis. Tazkiyat al-nafs purification of soul. Nafs levels of the self. Tawakkul reliance on God. Sabr patience. Ihsan excellence in worship. Falah success in this life and hereafter. Saada happiness. Taqwa God-consciousness. Quran Hadith Sunnah Islamic ethics adab. Rumi Ibn Arabi Rabia al-Adawiyya.
categories.Buddhist Thought: Buddhist philosophy ethics practice meditation across Theravada Mahayana Zen Tibetan traditions. Four Noble Truths dukkha suffering origin cessation path. Noble Eightfold Path right view right intention right speech right action right livelihood right effort right mindfulness right concentration. Nirvana liberation from samsara cycle of rebirth. Dharma teachings. Sangha community. Bodhisattva ideal compassion for all beings. Sunyata emptiness dependent origination. Metta loving-kindness. Karuna compassion. Mudita sympathetic joy. Upekkha equanimity. Vipassana insight meditation. Zazen sitting meditation. Koans. Pali Canon Tripitaka. Nagarjuna Madhyamaka. Vasubandhu Yogacara. Thich Nhat Hanh engaged Buddhism. Impermanence anicca, non-self anatta, mindfulness sati, prajna wisdom.
categories.Hindu Thought: Hindu philosophy spirituality ethics practice across Vedanta Yoga Samkhya Nyaya traditions. Moksha liberation from samsara. Dharma duty righteousness cosmic order. Artha prosperity purpose. Kama pleasure desire. Purushartha four aims of human life. Atman self soul. Brahman ultimate reality. Bhagavad Gita Arjuna Krishna karma yoga jnana yoga bhakti yoga. Upanishads Vedas. Patanjali Yoga Sutras eight limbs of yoga yama niyama asana pranayama pratyahara dharana dhyana samadhi. Ahimsa non-violence. Satya truth. Bhakti devotion. Seva selfless service. Advaita Vedanta Shankara non-duality. Ramanuja Vishishtadvaita. Vairagya detachment. Santosha contentment. Tapas austerity discipline. Sattva rajas tamas gunas.
categories.Confucian & Chinese Thought: Confucian philosophy Chinese ethical thought Daoist philosophy. Confucius Analerta Lunyu Mencius Mengzi Xunzi Zhu Xi Wang Yangming Neo-Confucianism. Ren benevolence humaneness. Li ritual propriety. Yi righteousness. Zhi wisdom. Xin faithfulness. Junzi exemplary person gentleman. Xiao filial piety. Zhongyong Doctrine of the Mean. Self-cultivation xiuji xiushen moral development. De moral power virtue. Wu wei non-action effortless action. Dao the Way path. Laozi Daodejing Tao Te Ching. Zhuangzi butterfly dream transformation. Ziran naturalness spontaneity. Pu simplicity uncarved block. Harmony he tianren heyi unity of heaven and human. Five relationships social ethics. Mandate of Heaven tianming.
categories.Jewish Thought: Jewish philosophy theology ethics mysticism law. Maimonides Guide for the Perplexed Mishneh Torah eight levels of charity. Martin Buber I and Thou dialogue. Emmanuel Levinas ethics of the face the Other infinity. Abraham Joshua Heschel radical amazement. Philo of Alexandria contemplation and reason. Spinoza. Torah Talmud Midrash Halakha Jewish law ethics. Tikkun olam repair of the world social justice. Chesed loving-kindness. Shalom peace wholeness. Simcha joy obligation. Kavvanah intention devotion in prayer. Teshuva repentance return turning. Menucha rest tranquility sabbath. Kabbalah Jewish mysticism Zohar Ein Sof sefirot tikkun sparks. Hasidic thought joy in worship devekut. Mussar movement ethical self-improvement middot character traits.
categories.Christian Theology: Christian theology philosophy spiritual practice contemplative tradition. Augustine Confessions City of God illumination divine grace original sin. Thomas Aquinas Summa Theologiae natural law beatific vision five ways. Desert Fathers and Mothers monastic tradition. Benedict Rule of St Benedict. Meister Eckhart detachment Gelassenheit. John of the Cross dark night of the soul. Teresa of Avila Interior Castle contemplative prayer. Ignatius spiritual exercises discernment. Philo contemplative life. Salvation soteriology redemption grace. Beatitudes Sermon on the Mount. Theosis divinization deification Eastern Orthodox. Liberation theology Gustavo Gutierrez preferential option for the poor. Protestant work ethic Weber vocation calling. Dietrich Bonhoeffer costly grace. Catholic social teaching subsidiarity solidarity common good.
categories.African Philosophy: African philosophy ethics communitarian thought political philosophy. Ubuntu I am because we are umuntu ngumuntu ngabantu. Communalism relational ontology personhood through community. Ujamaa familyhood Julius Nyerere collective self-reliance. Kwame Gyekye moderate communitarianism. Ifeanyi Menkiti personhood and community. Wiredu consensual democracy. Tempels Bantu philosophy. Mbiti African religions. Botho Sotho-Tswana equivalent of ubuntu. Oral tradition proverbs wisdom elders. Ancestor reverence and continuity of community. Decolonial African philosophy. Sage philosophy Odera Oruka. African feminist philosophy Oyeronke Oyewumi.
categories.Indigenous & Latin American Thought: Indigenous philosophies cosmologies ethics. Latin American decolonial thought. Buen vivir sumak kawsay good living Andean Quechua Aymara cosmovision. Pachamama Mother Earth rights of nature. Hozho Navajo Dine beauty balance harmony. Mitakuye oyasin Lakota all my relations interconnectedness. Shamanism spiritual healing plant medicine ceremony. Land-based ethics reciprocity with nature. Sacred ecology. Decolonial epistemology Walter Mignolo Anibal Quijano coloniality of power. Indigenous knowledge systems two-eyed seeing Etuaptmumk. Relational cosmology kinship with all beings.
categories.Japanese & East Asian Cultural Concepts: Japanese cultural philosophical aesthetic concepts. Korean cultural psychology. Ikigai reason for being life purpose what makes life worth living Japan. Wabi-sabi beauty in imperfection transience rustic simplicity. Mono no aware pathos of things bittersweet awareness of impermanence. Shinrin-yoku forest bathing nature immersion. Gaman enduring patience dignity. Kaizen continuous improvement. Kintsugi golden repair embracing flaws. Jeong Korean deep emotional bond attachment affection. Han Korean collective grief unresolved resentment historical sorrow. Shimcheong deep heart sentiment. Nunchi social awareness emotional intelligence Korean. Heung Korean joy exuberance. Amae Japanese dependence indulgence.
categories.Anthropology: Cultural anthropology social anthropology ethnographic study of meaning and well-being. Clifford Geertz thick description interpretation of cultures. Victor Turner ritual process liminality communitas. Mary Douglas purity and danger symbolic boundaries. Pierre Bourdieu habitus cultural capital practice. Ethnography fieldwork participant observation informants. Moral anthropology Didier Fassin ethics of ordinary life. Ontological anthropology ontological turn more-than-human. Lifeworld cultural models folk models of happiness. Rites of passage Van Gennep separation transition incorporation. Symbolic anthropology rituals symbols meaning-making.
categories.Sociology & Political Economy: Sociological theory political economy development studies welfare state. Amartya Sen capability approach Development as Freedom. Martha Nussbaum capabilities list. Human development index UNDP. Manfred Max-Neef fundamental human needs. Durkheim anomie suicide social solidarity mechanical organic. Weber Protestant ethic rationalization disenchantment. Marx alienation. Social capital Robert Putnam Bowling Alone. Inequality Piketty Wilkinson Pickett. Quality of life indicators GDP alternatives Gross National Happiness Bhutan. Welfare economics social welfare function redistribution.
categories.Neuroscience & Cognitive Science: Neuroscience cognitive science brain imaging neural correlates. Neuroscience of well-being happiness reward circuits dopamine serotonin. Affective neuroscience Richard Davidson emotional styles set point theory. Default mode network self-referential processing mind wandering. Prefrontal cortex amygdala emotion regulation. Neuroplasticity meditation brain changes. Consciousness studies neural correlates of consciousness. Embodied cognition enactivism extended mind. fMRI EEG neuroimaging experimental paradigms cognitive tasks.
categories.Health & Medical Sciences: Medical health sciences public health clinical outcomes patient well-being. Health-related quality of life HRQOL SF-36 EQ-5D measures. Wellness programs health promotion disease prevention. Mental health psychiatric epidemiology depression anxiety treatment outcomes. Palliative care end-of-life care hospice dignity therapy. Public health interventions population health social determinants of health. WHO definition of health physical mental social well-being. Biomedical outcomes mortality morbidity disability longevity.
